title: Admission Open Day
description: Parents are invited to visit the school, meet our team, and learn about the admission process.

title: End of Term Examination
description: Students begin their end of term examinations across nursery, primary and secondary classes.

title: Career and Character Day
description: A student development event focused on discipline, confidence, purpose and future careers.

title: Parents Meeting
description: Parents and guardians meet with school leadership for updates and academic progress discussions.
